home.title: A platform ready for safe growth
home.body: The bilingual core is prepared for future modules without building a healthcare module yet.

auth.title: Sign in
auth.body: Secure authentication will be connected to an approved provider later. No demo accounts or passwords exist.
auth.unavailable: Sign in is not enabled in this environment.

settings.title: General settings
settings.body: Language and theme preferences are stored locally for this phase and will be linked to a user account later.

profile.title: Profile
profile.body: This protected page is awaiting an authentication provider.

audit.title: Changes in the Last 24 Hours
audit.body: This is a preview of the audit-log contract. Undo is not implemented until a secure backend exists.
audit.placeholder: Demonstration data only — not an operational audit log.

administration.title: Platform Administration
administration.placeholder: Demonstration data and local-only behavior — backend persistence and authorization are not implemented.
administration.permanentDisabled: Permanent deletion is disabled until backend safeguards are verified.

dashboard.title: Inspection dashboard
dashboard.sample: Clearly labelled demonstration data — not persisted.

execution.title: Perform inspection
execution.placeholder: Draft persistence and evidence uploads are placeholders in this phase.

reports.title: Inspection reports
reports.placeholder: PDF and Excel exports are placeholders.
